name: list_courses
description: Retrieve all courses the authenticated user is enrolled in. Returns course names, IDs, enrollment terms, start/end dates, and enrollment state. Supports filtering by enrollment type, state, and search terms.

parameters.name: enrollment_type
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment role: teacher, student, ta, observer, designer.

parameters.name: enrollment_state
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment state: active, invited_or_pending, completed.

parameters.name: state[]
parameters.description: Filter by course state: unpublished, available, completed, deleted.

parameters.name: include[]
parameters.description: Additional data to include: total_students, teachers, term, course_image, etc.
